campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 19, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, where they discussed staffing vacancies and the city's efforts to recruit and retain employees. The council also heard public input on various matters and noted that the Boogie Festival is happening this weekend.
keyTopics: City staffing vacancies and recruitment/retention strategies
Public hearing on government code section 3502 matters
Boogie Festival this weekend
Council reports and public comment period

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — May 6, 2026
saratoga.summary: The Saratoga City Council approved preliminary engineering reports and held public hearings on financial matters for the upcoming fiscal year. The council also discussed whether to pursue charter city status and reviewed potential new tax options and revenue estimates.
keyTopics: Engineer's Report approval for fiscal year planning
Public hearing on financial resolutions and tax options
Decision on pursuing charter city status for Saratoga
Review of potential new revenue and tax proposals

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve previous meeting minutes, review the town's finances for March, and authorize several agreements and contracts. The council also approved a list of projects for the upcoming fiscal year and considered grant applications.
keyTopics: Approved five-year service agreement
Authorized construction contract with O'Grady Paving
Accepted donation of an Automated External Defibrillator (AED)
Reviewed March 2026 financial and investment report

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agendas and review committee work plans. The council cancelled their May 26 meeting and discussed items for their June 2 agenda, including updates to neighborhood services and rules/government operations.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26, 2026 City Council meeting
June 2, 2026 agenda planning and item additions
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan updates
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan review
Council-sponsored events approval

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 26, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 26, 2026 to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and discuss upcoming city events and year-end planning. The council also received committee reports and addressed questions from staff and council members.
keyTopics: Approval of previous meeting minutes
Public comment period on city matters
Upcoming special events in Mountain View
End-of-year survey for residents or staff feedback
Committee reports and staff updates

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 18, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a meeting on May 18, 2026, to approve previous meeting notes and review grant applications for community events and neighborhood programs in the spring cycle. Residents had the opportunity to speak during a public hearing about which local projects and gatherings should receive city funding.
keyTopics: Approval of December 2025 subcommittee meeting minutes
Spring 2026 Community Events and Neighborhood Grant Program applications under review
Public comment period on proposed community grants

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — June 1, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met on June 1, 2026, to approve minutes from an April legislative committee meeting and hear from residents on city matters. The council also received a legislative update, though the full agenda appears incomplete in the available materials.
keyTopics: Approval of April 6, 2026 Legislative Review Committee minutes
Public comment period for residents on any city matter (3 minutes per speaker)
Legislative update briefing

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — June 1, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara's City Council held a Stadium Neighborhood Relations Ad Hoc Subcommittee meeting on June 1, 2026. The meeting was open to the public both in-person and remotely via Zoom, with options for residents to submit written comments ahead of time.
keyTopics: Stadium Neighborhood Relations Ad Hoc Subcommittee discussions
In-person and remote participation options for residents
Public comment submission process (email by 10 a.m. prior day)

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 7, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council met to review and approve updates to the city's federal funding plan for 2025-2026, consider changes to how council vacancies are filled, and handle routine meeting business like approving previous minutes and scheduling upcoming meetings.
keyTopics: Substantial Amendment to the 2025-2030 Consolidated Plan and 2025-2026 workplan (federal funding priorities)
Ordinance to amend council vacancy procedures
Review of new workplan requests from individual council members
Approval of previous meeting minutes and council meeting calendar

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 6, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council held a full-day meeting covering planning projects, public safety operations, municipal fees, and infrastructure spending. Council reviewed updates from Planning and Transportation, Police and Fire departments, and discussed the city's capital improvement projects and internal service funds.
keyTopics: Planning and Development Services updates
Police and Fire department reports
FY 2027 municipal fee schedule (new fees or adjustments)
Capital Improvement Program and infrastructure projects
Emergency Services operations
